caption: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a black blazer over a white top and blue jeans, stands before a projection screen in a dimly lit room. She is giving a presentation, gesturing with her hands and holding a small notebook or tablet. A man wearing a green beanie is seen from the back, listening to the presentation. The projection screen displays a slide with the headline "Data is the new oil." and a paragraph of smaller text below it. The slide also features several icons, including a wireless tower and a building. To the right of the presenter is a black mesh office chair. As the scene progresses, the woman continues to speak and gesture, shifting her posture slightly while the man remains still in the foreground. The on-screen content remains static across the sequence.
